title: Confirm details
subtitle: Check time, place, and purpose.
overview: A2 Core builds practical control: daily tasks, simple stories, short writing, listening repair, and clearer spoken output.

sections.title: A2 core focus
rows: Just to confirm, we are meeting at three, right?
确认一下，我们三点见，对吗？
We are meeting at the library to study English.
我们在图书馆见面学英语。
我可以确认一下时间吗？
Yes, we are meeting at three.

items.en: Just to confirm, we are meeting at three, right?
items.zh: 确认一下，我们三点见，对吗？

items.en: We are meeting at the library to study English.
items.zh: 我们在图书馆见面学英语。
我可以确认一下时间吗？

items.en: Yes, we are meeting at three.
This is practical A2 English I can use in real life.
items.zh: 这是我能在真实生活中使用的实用 A2 英语。

items.en: I will change the details and say it about myself.
items.zh: 我会改变细节，说成关于我自己的内容。

lines.speaker: A
lines.zh: 我可以确认一下时间吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: Yes, we are meeting at three.

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you give one more useful detail?
lines.zh: 你能再给一个有用的细节吗？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: We are meeting at the library to study English.
lines.zh: 我们在图书馆见面学英语。

items.en: Just to confirm, we are meeting at three, right?
items.zh: 确认一下，我们三点见，对吗？

items.en: We are meeting at the library to study English.
items.zh: 我们在图书馆见面学英语。

items.en: Make a new version with your own place, time, or reason.
items.zh: 用你自己的地点、时间或原因造一个新版本。

items.en: Read it aloud until it sounds calm and natural.
items.zh: 大声朗读，直到听起来平稳自然。
